one_time_description: Robinson Huron Treaty Settlement receivable from Federal and Ontario Provincial Governments for past compensation arising from obligations under the Robinson Huron Treaty of 1850
economic_notes: Operates 60MW Bow Lake Wind Farm through Nodin Kitagan LP (50% share via Mukwaa Inc.); 25MW Goulais Wind Farm through Chi-Wiikwedong LP (49% share); rooftop solar projects through GBG-BFN LP (50.999%) and Zaagate Giizis Energy Inc. (100%); Blue Heron Industrial Park through Batchewana Band Industries Limited; telecom services through Batchewana Telecom entities (impaired fully in 2024); bingo and arena operations; subsequent to year-end, purchased remaining shares of Nodin Kitagan partnerships for approximately $11.4M
notes: Dominant one-time item: $608,959,273 Robinson Huron Treaty Settlement recognized as revenue in 2024, representing the vast majority of total revenue and annual surplus; these funds were transferred to a reserve immediately (Robinson Huron Treaty reserve = $608,959,273 in accumulated surplus). Batchewana Telecom Holding Inc. investment fully impaired for $1,970,848 with no financial statements received from the investment group. Net financial assets of $600,156,653 is almost entirely attributable to the treaty settlement receivable. Cash statement shows a closing balance of $6,965,296 (cash $6,096,181 + restricted $869,115) but the statement of financial position cash line differs from cash flow statement ending balance by $570,000 — possible presentation note. Employer pension contributions were $1,101,477. Notes payable to BlueEarth Renewables Partnership of $7,390,490 arose during the year for turbine repair funding. Tangible capital asset net book value not extractable from the text provided (Schedule 1 referenced but not included). Segment disclosure (Schedule 2) referenced but full detail not provided in text. Prior year audit opinion dated January 15, 2024 was by another auditor.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
